seoTitle: Seaham vs Seal Rocks — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Seaham and Seal Rocks. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Seaham vs Seal Rocks: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Seaham and Seal Rocks.
heading: Seaham vs Seal Rocks — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Seaham, New South Wales and Seal Rocks, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Seaham has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Seal Rocks (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Seaham or Seal Rocks safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Seaham has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Seal Rocks scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Seaham scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Seal Rocks scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Seaham or Seal Rocks?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Seaham has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
